from dataclasses import dataclass
from typing import List


@dataclass
class Token:
    kind: str
    value: object
    line: int
    col: int


KEYWORDS = frozenset({
    "let", "if", "else", "while", "for", "in",
    "fn", "return", "break", "continue",
    "true", "false", "nil",
})

PUNCTUATION = frozenset({
    "+", "-", "*", "/", "%",
    "==", "!=", "<", ">", "<=", ">=",
    "&&", "||",
    "!", "=",

    ",", ";", ":", ".",

# Multi-c

from tinylang.parser import parse


def names_of(stmts):
    return [type(s).__name__ for s in stmts]


def test_let_stmt():
    p = parse("let x = 1;")
    assert names_of(p.stmts) == ["LetStmt"]
    ls = p.stmts[0]
    assert ls.name == "x"
    assert type(ls.value).__name__ == "NumberLit"
    assert ls.value.value == 1.0


def test_precedence_mul_before_add():
    p = parse("let x = 1 + 2 * 3;")
    rhs = p.stmts[0].value
    assert type(rhs).__name__ == "BinaryOp"
    assert rhs.op == "+"
